title: Resolving Error 500 on Order Tracking Page
body:
Issue: Customers receive HTTP 500 when accessing the order tracking page on the web portal. Resolution steps:
1. Clear application cache: Navigate to the portal's admin panel, select 'Cache Management', and click 'Clear Application Cache'.
2. Restart the order-tracking service: On the application server, run 'sudo systemctl restart order-tracking.service'.
3. Verify database connectivity: Ensure the orders database is reachable and the 'customer_orders' table is not locked. Use the command 'check_db_connectivity --service=orders'.
4. Run diagnostic script: If the issue persists, execute '/opt/tools/diag_order_track.sh' and attach its output to the ticket.

title: How to Update Billing Information
body:
To update your billing information:
1. Log in to your account and go to 'My Account' > 'Billing'.
2. Click 'Edit' next to 'Payment Method'.
3. Enter the new credit card details and billing address.
4. Click 'Save Changes'. The new method will be charged on the next billing cycle.

title: Creating a New User Account
body:
Follow these steps to create an account:
1. Visit our homepage and click 'Sign Up'.
2. Enter your email address and choose a strong password.
3. Verify your email by clicking the link sent to your inbox.
4. Complete your profile by providing your name and company name. Your account will be active immediately.
